caption:
More ad spend does not fix a broken shop. It funds the leak faster.

Every dollar you add pushes more leads into the same slow follow-up. Double your budget and you roughly double the number of leads going cold before anyone calls them back.

Industry lead-response research shows only 17% of service businesses answer a new lead within an hour. Respond in under 5 minutes instead and you close at nearly double the rate.

Before you raise your ad budget, audit how fast your team actually responds. Fix the leak. Then scale.

DM "SCALE" for that audit.

#ServiceBusiness #LeadGeneration #SpeedToLead #HomeServices #BusinessGrowth
rationale: Reels still carry the reach edge for cold audiences, and this stakes out a sharp, unclaimed brand POV (scaling ads before fixing follow-up burns money faster) that no past post has argued directly.
